name: box-framework
description: The opinionated, batteries-included backend framework for solo/indie developers — Bun-native, edge-first, with first-class Drizzle, i18n, and dual-runtime support

scripts.publish:core: cd packages/core && npm publish --access public && cd ../..
scripts.publish:adapters: cd packages/adapters && npm publish --access public && cd ../..
scripts.publish:validator: cd packages/validator && npm publish --access public && cd ../..
scripts.publish:db: cd packages/db && npm publish --access public && cd ../..
scripts.publish:i18n: cd packages/i18n && npm publish --access public && cd ../..
scripts.publish:auth: cd packages/auth && npm publish --access public && cd ../..
scripts.publish:openapi: cd packages/openapi && npm publish --access public && cd ../..
scripts.publish:create-box: cd packages/create-box && npm publish --access public && cd ../..
scripts.publish:all: bun run publish:core && bun run publish:adapters && bun run publish:validator && bun run publish:db && bun run publish:i18n && bun run publish:auth && bun run publish:openapi && bun run publish:create-box
